# ConformanceRequirements.IsAdvisoryKeyword method

Returns `true` when *keyword* is ADVISORY (SHOULD family) (spec §2).

```csharp
public static bool IsAdvisoryKeyword(string keyword)
```

| keyword | The keyword token. |

## Return Value

`true` when advisory.
